briefdescription.para: This table defines the table for the A1 set of test keys and ksv.
This table defines the table for the A2 set of test keys and ksv.
This table defines the table for the B1 set of test keys and ksv.
This table defines the table for the B2 set of test keys and ksv.

memberdef.argsstring: (tHandler *theHandler, KEYMGMT_tTableID theTableID, const uint64_t *theBuf, int theBufSize)
memberdef.name: doLoadTable

briefdescription.para: This function loads a specific table of a handler.

parameterdescription.para: the handler to load the table of
the buffer of data to load
the size of the buffer (in bytes)

simplesect.para: The name of the file specified in the call to KEYFILE_Validate is currently not used. Any file name can be specified.

parameterdescription.para: the system up time in seconds

briefdescription.para: This function implements the "keymgmt loader" debug command.

parameterdescription.para: the number of command line arguments
the list of the command line arguments
